issue.title: 10.com.au

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://10.com.au/race-across-the-world](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Frace-across-the-world) ### Comment > When I enable the AdBlock on 10Play, I'm met with this ''Unexpected Error" which prevents the videos from playing. Also, when I turn off AdBlock I have no issue playing videos which leads me to believe that it isn't something external causing the issue. This problem is the same for all videos on the site. I've also ensured my VPN is turned off as that can sometimes cause issues. > > Hopefully it can be fixed and thankyou for the otherwise highly effective online tool! :) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/f417y0ea6g8o4oc08sgggs88k0ccw8gk8xndhzbyhw.png?nc=1)

comment.body:
> Hi [@TesterMan247](https://github.com/TesterMan247), could you please test these custom rules?
> 
> Based on the HAR you provided, the issue is that the `google-ima3` stub (which replaces `ima3.js`) conflicts with the real `ima3_dai.js` (DAI SDK) that loads on top of it. This breaks the DAI/SSAI stream initialization, causing the "Unexpected Error".
> 
> Please add the following to AdGuard → Settings → Filters → User rules and test if video plays:
> 
> ! #229059 — allow real IMA3 SDK to load; stub conflicts with ima3_dai.js breaking SSAI stream init
> @@||imasdk.googleapis.com/js/sdkloader/ima3.js$script,domain=10.com.au|10play.com.au

Did you guys make any changes at all regarding this issue, as the videos now work without issues, and I haven't even added this rule yet. Perhaps you guys already added this rule in or made other changes elsewhere?

PS: I also did add this rule and the videos still worked, so not sure if its still worth adding or not, since everything is working fine without adding that rule at all.

Could you guys with the same issue also try and see if you are getting the same results as me or not?

Thanks mu-hun and all.

comment.body:
@mu-hun I finally managed to reproduce the pop-up:

`https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/z3ib978j6j34yl41o74ze/ChatGPT.mht?rlkey=5mafnxgxu97d9mtqln05k18bo&st=y6yw99hu&dl=1`

I think that the snippet:

```
chatgpt.com#%#//scriptlet('set-session-storage-item', 'has-dismissed-login-modal', 'true')
```

is the best solution.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 4 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: game8.jp

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://meet.dramirtavari.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmeet.dramirtavari.com) ### Comment > Self-hosted Jitsi Meet at https://meet.dramirtavari.com/ shows a blank black screen when AdGuard Annoyances filter is enabled. > > AdGuard logs show the main document is modified by a cosmetic rule / removed HTML tag. > > The issue is fixed by this exception rule: > > `@@||meet.dramirtavari.com^$generichide` > > Please add an upstream exception for this site or adjust the Annoyances filter rule that breaks Jitsi Meet. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.google.com/search?client=firefox-b-d&q=what%27s+adrenaline+rush](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.google.com%2Fsearch%3Fclient%3Dfirefox-b-d%26q%3Dwhat%2527s%2Badrenaline%2Brush) ### Comment > It seems that Adguard extension is removing Google's AI Overview for some reason. However, I have not enabled any Adguard's/Easylist's AI Blocker Filterlist. It's not just with firefox, but it is also blocking that google overview section in my other browsers as well (where I am using UBO with Adguard Annoyances enabled). ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/b84geishb9wsock8wgsw0kkogso04w4phdhbt9lz34.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8z8v1g1h5ts0okkgscowokkcco4ssc8b2l9s0v7jow.png?nc=1)

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Other:**

comment.body:
> Would be great to just drop this specific block, as most people don't expect a general "annoyances" toggle to secretly disable a core search engine feature.

Agreed, it's not filtered correctly too and results in a "something went wrong" error message, which creates confusion and technical breakage. As well as that Bing is not treated on the same level here. Seeing that this hasn't been fixed in the past months, it's best to fall back to other open source blocklists like Fanboy's Annoyance List. The team at AdGuard should be aware too that this won't make people like me recommend their products.

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).
